item.title: Removable Media Restore Tools [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Media Restore Tools [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Media Restore Tools
(Utilities)
Removable Media Restore Software helps you to regain lost data from major brands of USB hard disk in major data loss situations including software/hardware malfunctioning, virus/worm corrupt, during frequent disk format, improper system shut down, power failure etc. Lost data regain program provides advance list wizard help manual for novice users while recouping files from pen drives.

[read more]
item.description:
Removable Media Restore Tools
(Utilities)
Removable Media Restore Software helps you to regain lost data from major brands of USB hard disk in major data loss situations including software/hardware malfunctioning, virus/worm corrupt, during frequent disk format, improper system shut down, power failure etc. Lost data regain program provides advance list wizard help manual for novice users while recouping files from pen drives.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Removable Media Restore Tools
(Utilities)
Removable Media Restore Software helps you to regain lost data from major brands of USB hard disk in major data loss situations including software/hardware malfunctioning, virus/worm corrupt, during frequent disk format, improper system shut down, power failure etc. Lost data regain program provides advance list wizard help manual for novice users while recouping files from pen drives.

[read more]

item.title: Hard Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Hard Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: myrecoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Hard Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Highly advanced DDR professional regaining application provides facility to computer users get back accidently deleted file and folders even from recycle bin. Freeware digital data recovery software can be easily operable by technical and non technical persons with interactive user friendly GUI environments. File regaining utility rescue permanently lost precious documents from USB flash digital storage media in specify way. DDR professional recovery program can be easily runs under Windows installed system including win xp, vista, Windows server etc. Technically deigned file recovery program easily extract missing or lost images, music file, compressed files only by connecting damage storage media to the Hard Drive Recovery software installed computer system. Perfect DDR restoring application provides reliable data regaining solution without need to any other lost data recovery expert. Professional windows file recovery tool conveniently reconstruct accidentally loss critical information from formatted hard disk drive. Computer user can be freely used all recovery function and features by help of user friendly GUI based platform. Popular files salvages application is suitable option to recover deleted text files, video clipping etc from crashed memory card. Hard drive partition recovery product offers the best unique feature for speedily finding accurate result to entire deleted important folders, office documents, exe file etc. Feature: * Best DDR professional file recovers software fastest retrieves deleted valuable recorded database, photos from HDD drives. * Awards winning digital data restoring program has highest erased data recoverable capability in very minimal time and effort. * Powerful data salvage utility is ultimate resolution to regenerates and repair deleted or corrupted data in original conditions. * Superior DDR file recovery product presents non destructive, cost effective, efficient and fastly restores formatted folders accurately.

[read more]
item.description:
Hard Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Highly advanced DDR professional regaining application provides facility to computer users get back accidently deleted file and folders even from recycle bin. Freeware digital data recovery software can be easily operable by technical and non technical persons with interactive user friendly GUI environments. File regaining utility rescue permanently lost precious documents from USB flash digital storage media in specify way. DDR professional recovery program can be easily runs under Windows installed system including win xp, vista, Windows server etc. Technically deigned file recovery program easily extract missing or lost images, music file, compressed files only by connecting damage storage media to the Hard Drive Recovery software installed computer system. Perfect DDR restoring application provides reliable data regaining solution without need to any other lost data recovery expert. Professional windows file recovery tool conveniently reconstruct accidentally loss critical information from formatted hard disk drive. Computer user can be freely used all recovery function and features by help of user friendly GUI based platform. Popular files salvages application is suitable option to recover deleted text files, video clipping etc from crashed memory card. Hard drive partition recovery product offers the best unique feature for speedily finding accurate result to entire deleted important folders, office documents, exe file etc. Feature: * Best DDR professional file recovers software fastest retrieves deleted valuable recorded database, photos from HDD drives. * Awards winning digital data restoring program has highest erased data recoverable capability in very minimal time and effort. * Powerful data salvage utility is ultimate resolution to regenerates and repair deleted or corrupted data in original conditions. * Superior DDR file recovery product presents non destructive, cost effective, efficient and fastly restores formatted folders accurately.

[read more]

Hard Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Highly advanced DDR professional regaining application provides facility to computer users get back accidently deleted file and folders even from recycle bin. Freeware digital data recovery software can be easily operable by technical and non technical persons with interactive user friendly GUI environments. File regaining utility rescue permanently lost precious documents from USB flash digital storage media in specify way. DDR professional recovery program can be easily runs under Windows installed system including win xp, vista, Windows server etc. Technically deigned file recovery program easily extract missing or lost images, music file, compressed files only by connecting damage storage media to the Hard Drive Recovery software installed computer system. Perfect DDR restoring application provides reliable data regaining solution without need to any other lost data recovery expert. Professional windows file recovery tool conveniently reconstruct accidentally loss critical information from formatted hard disk drive. Computer user can be freely used all recovery function and features by help of user friendly GUI based platform. Popular files salvages application is suitable option to recover deleted text files, video clipping etc from crashed memory card. Hard drive partition recovery product offers the best unique feature for speedily finding accurate result to entire deleted important folders, office documents, exe file etc. Feature: * Best DDR professional file recovers software fastest retrieves deleted valuable recorded database, photos from HDD drives. * Awards winning digital data restoring program has highest erased data recoverable capability in very minimal time and effort. * Powerful data salvage utility is ultimate resolution to regenerates and repair deleted or corrupted data in original conditions. * Superior DDR file recovery product presents non destructive, cost effective, efficient and fastly restores formatted folders accurately.

[read more]

item.title: BOOTLOOP SAVER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: BOOTLOOP SAVER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
BOOTLOOP SAVER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
BOOTLOOP SAVER by revWhiteShadow is a revolutionary Magisk module designed to automatically disable any problematic modules causing bootloop issues on your Android device. Developed by the talented developer revWhiteShadow, this module acts as a safeguard, ensuring your device boots smoothly without being hindered by conflicting or problematic modules. It's the go-to solution for Magisk users who want a hassle-free, error-free booting experience. With BOOTLOOP SAVER, you can enjoy the benefits of Magisk modules while maintaining the stability and reliability of your Android device.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]
item.description:

It's the go-to solution for Magisk users who want a hassle-free, error-free booting experience. With BOOTLOOP SAVER, you can enjoy the benefits of Magisk modules while maintaining the stability and reliability of your Android device.

item.title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.

[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.

OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
PHOENIX SDM 7
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050006/]MTK Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050005/]SDM 8 Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050004/]SDM 7 Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2019745/]SDM 6 Optimization [/url]

[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

item.title: GODSPEED MODE A.I. [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED MODE A.I. [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED MODE A.I.
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
This Magisk Module will start automatic with boot,there is 2 profiles in this module
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:

For 64-bit systems:
bash

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:
